question: What do you need to make homemade classic chocolate chip makeies?
answer: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 cup butter softened, 34 cup granulated sugar, 34 cup packed brown sugar, 2 large eggs, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 cups chocolate chips
context: Recipe: Homemade Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 cup butter softened, 34 cup granulated sugar, 34 cup packed brown sugar, 2 large eggs, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 cups chocolate chips. Instructions: Heat oven to 375F. In large bowl, beat butter and sugars with electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla. In medium bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and salt gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well mixed. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Cool 2 minutes remove from cookie sheets to cooling racks.
title: Homemade Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies

question: What is step 3 for making Homemade Beef Tacos?
answer: Warm taco shells according to package directions.
context: Recipe: Homemade Beef Tacos. Full instructions: In large skillet, cook ground beef over medium-high heat until browned drain. Add taco seasoning and water simmer 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Warm taco shells according to package directions. Fill each shell with beef mixture and desired toppings. Serve with salsa.
title: Homemade Beef Tacos

question: What is step 1 for making Homemade Spaghetti Carbonara?
answer: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water.
context: Recipe: Homemade Spaghetti Carbonara. Full instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
title: Homemade Spaghetti Carbonara

question: What ingredients are needed for Homemade Pancakes?
answer: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving
context: Recipe: Homemade Pancakes. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
title: Homemade Pancakes

question: How do I cook Chicken Stir Fry?
answer: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
context: Recipe: Chicken Stir Fry. Ingredients: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast cut into strips, 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, 1 red bell pepper sliced, 1 cup broccoli florets, 1 carrot julienned, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 tablespoon fresh ginger grated, 14 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 green onions sliced, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, cooked rice for serving. Instructions: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
title: Chicken Stir Fry

question: What is step 1 for making Perfect Pancakes?
answer: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
context: Recipe: Perfect Pancakes. Full instructions: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
title: Perfect Pancakes

question: What ingredients go into Easy Chicken Stir Fry?
answer: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast cut into strips, 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, 1 red bell pepper sliced, 1 cup broccoli florets, 1 carrot julienned, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 tablespoon fresh ginger grated, 14 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 green onions sliced, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, cooked rice for serving
context: Recipe: Easy Chicken Stir Fry. Ingredients: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast cut into strips, 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, 1 red bell pepper sliced, 1 cup broccoli florets, 1 carrot julienned, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 tablespoon fresh ginger grated, 14 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 green onions sliced, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, cooked rice for serving. Instructions: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
title: Easy Chicken Stir Fry

title: Homemade Spaghetti Carbonara

question: What's required for making Homemade Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies?
answer: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 cup butter softened, 34 cup granulated sugar, 34 cup packed brown sugar, 2 large eggs, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 cups chocolate chips
context: Recipe: Homemade Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 cup butter softened, 34 cup granulated sugar, 34 cup packed brown sugar, 2 large eggs, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 cups chocolate chips. Instructions: Heat oven to 375F. In large bowl, beat butter and sugars with electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla. question: What is step 1 for making Perfect Chicken Stir Fry?
answer: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside.
context: Recipe: Perfect Chicken Stir Fry. Full instructions: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. question: List the ingredients for Pancakes.
answer: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving
context: Recipe: Pancakes. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. question: List the items for classic spaghetti carbonara.
answer: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped
context: Recipe: Classic Spaghetti Carbonara. Ingredients: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped. Instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
title: Classic Spaghetti Carbonara

question: How do you make Easy Caesar Salad?
answer: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add romaine lettuce and toss to coat with dressing. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and croutons. Serve immediately.
context: Recipe: Easy Caesar Salad. Ingredients: 1 large head romaine lettuce chopped, 12 cup mayonnaise, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce, 12 cup grated Parmesan cheese, 14 cup olive oil, salt and pepper to taste, 1 cup croutons. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add romaine lettuce and toss to coat with dressing. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and croutons. Serve immediately.
title: Easy Caesar Salad

question: What's required for making Homemade Spaghetti Carbonara?
answer: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped
context: Recipe: Homemade Spaghetti Carbonara. Ingredients: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped. Instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
title: Homemade Spaghetti Carbonara

question: How to prepare Caesar Salad?
answer: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add romaine lettuce and toss to coat with dressing. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and croutons. Serve immediately.
context: Recipe: Caesar Salad. Ingredients: 1 large head romaine lettuce chopped, 12 cup mayonnaise, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce, 12 cup grated Parmesan cheese, 14 cup olive oil, salt and pepper to taste, 1 cup croutons. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add romaine lettuce and toss to coat with dressing. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and croutons. Serve immediately.
title: Caesar Salad

question: How do I cook Classic Chicken Stir Fry?
answer: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
context: Recipe: Classic Chicken Stir Fry. Ingredients: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast cut into strips, 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, 1 red bell pepper sliced, 1 cup broccoli florets, 1 carrot julienned, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 tablespoon fresh ginger grated, 14 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 green onions sliced, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, cooked rice for serving. Instructions: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
title: Classic Chicken Stir Fry

question: What do I need to make Spaghetti Carbonara?
answer: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped
context: Recipe: Spaghetti Carbonara. Ingredients: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped. Instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
title: Spaghetti Carbonara

question: How to prepare Pancakes?
answer: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
context: Recipe: Pancakes. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
title: Pancakes

question: How do i make perfect classic chocolate chip makeies?
answer: Heat oven to 375F. In large bowl, beat butter and sugars with electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla. In medium bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and salt gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well mixed. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Cool 2 minutes remove from cookie sheets to cooling racks.
context: Recipe: Perfect Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 cup butter softened, 34 cup granulated sugar, 34 cup packed brown sugar, 2 large eggs, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 cups chocolate chips. Instructions: Heat oven to 375F. In large bowl, beat butter and sugars with electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla. In medium bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and salt gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well mixed. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Cool 2 minutes remove from cookie sheets to cooling racks.
title: Perfect Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies

Instructions: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
title: Easy Chicken Stir Fry

question: List the ingredients for Classic Pancakes.
answer: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving
context: Recipe: Classic Pancakes. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
title: Classic Pancakes

question: What's the prepareing time for spaghetti carbonara?
answer: 1 minutes
context: Recipe: Spaghetti Carbonara. Instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
title: Spaghetti Carbonara

question: List the ingredients for Perfect Caesar Salad.
answer: 1 large head romaine lettuce chopped, 12 cup mayonnaise, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce, 12 cup grated Parmesan cheese, 14 cup olive oil, salt and pepper to taste, 1 cup croutons
context: Recipe: Perfect Caesar Salad. Ingredients: 1 large head romaine lettuce chopped, 12 cup mayonnaise, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce, 12 cup grated Parmesan cheese, 14 cup olive oil, salt and pepper to taste, 1 cup croutons. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. question: What's required for making Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies?
answer: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 cup butter softened, 34 cup granulated sugar, 34 cup packed brown sugar, 2 large eggs, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 cups chocolate chips
context: Recipe: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 cup butter softened, 34 cup granulated sugar, 34 cup packed brown sugar, 2 large eggs, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 cups chocolate chips. Instructions: Heat oven to 375F. In large bowl, beat butter and sugars with electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla. In medium bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and salt gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well mixed. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Cool 2 minutes remove from cookie sheets to cooling racks.
title: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies

answer: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add romaine lettuce and toss to coat with dressing. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and croutons. Serve immediately.
context: Recipe: Easy Caesar Salad. Ingredients: 1 large head romaine lettuce chopped, 12 cup mayonnaise, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce, 12 cup grated Parmesan cheese, 14 cup olive oil, salt and pepper to taste, 1 cup croutons. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add romaine lettuce and toss to coat with dressing. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and croutons. Serve immediately.
title: Easy Caesar Salad

question: What's required for making Beef Tacos?

context: Recipe: Beef Tacos. Ingredients: 1 pound ground beef, 1 packet taco seasoning, 34 cup water, 8 taco shells, 1 cup shredded lettuce, 1 cup diced tomatoes, 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese, 12 cup diced onion, 12 cup sour cream, salsa for serving. Instructions: In large skillet, cook ground beef over medium-high heat until browned drain. Add taco seasoning and water simmer 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. question: What's the recipe for Easy Spaghetti Carbonara?
answer: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
context: Recipe: Easy Spaghetti Carbonara. Ingredients: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped. Instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
title: Easy Spaghetti Carbonara

question: What is step 2 for making Easy Chicken Stir Fry?
answer: Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat.
context: Recipe: Easy Chicken Stir Fry. Full instructions: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
title: Easy Chicken Stir Fry

question: What is step 1 for making Homemade Pancakes?
answer: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
context: Recipe: Homemade Pancakes. Full instructions: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
title: Homemade Pancakes

Instructions: Heat oven to 375F. In large bowl, beat butter and sugars with electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla. In medium bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and salt gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well mixed. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Cool 2 minutes remove from cookie sheets to cooling racks.
title: Homemade Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies

question: What are the cooking instructions for Perfect Caesar Salad?
answer: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add romaine lettuce and toss to coat with dressing. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and croutons. Serve immediately.
context: Recipe: Perfect Caesar Salad. Ingredients: 1 large head romaine lettuce chopped, 12 cup mayonnaise, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce, 12 cup grated Parmesan cheese, 14 cup olive oil, salt and pepper to taste, 1 cup croutons. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add romaine lettuce and toss to coat with dressing. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and croutons. Serve immediately.
title: Perfect Caesar Salad

question: What's the recipe for Perfect Pancakes?
answer: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
context: Recipe: Perfect Pancakes. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
title: Perfect Pancakes

question: List the ingredients for Perfect Chicken Stir Fry.
answer: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast cut into strips, 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, 1 red bell pepper sliced, 1 cup broccoli florets, 1 carrot julienned, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 tablespoon fresh ginger grated, 14 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 green onions sliced, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, cooked rice for serving
context: Recipe: Perfect Chicken Stir Fry. Ingredients: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast cut into strips, 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, 1 red bell pepper sliced, 1 cup broccoli florets, 1 carrot julienned, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 tablespoon fresh ginger grated, 14 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 green onions sliced, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, cooked rice for serving. Instructions: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
title: Perfect Chicken Stir Fry

question: What do you need to cook Perfect Spaghetti Carbonara?
answer: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped
context: Recipe: Perfect Spaghetti Carbonara. Ingredients: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped. Instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
title: Perfect Spaghetti Carbonara

answer: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped
context: Recipe: Classic Spaghetti Carbonara. Ingredients: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped. Instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
title: Classic Spaghetti Carbonara

question: What do you need to cook Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies?
answer: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 cup butter softened, 34 cup granulated sugar, 34 cup packed brown sugar, 2 large eggs, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 cups chocolate chips
context: Recipe: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 cup butter softened, 34 cup granulated sugar, 34 cup packed brown sugar, 2 large eggs, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 cups chocolate chips. Instructions: Heat oven to 375F. In large bowl, beat butter and sugars with electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla. In medium bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and salt gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well mixed. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Cool 2 minutes remove from cookie sheets to cooling racks.
title: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies

question: List the ingredients for Easy Pancakes.
answer: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving
context: Recipe: Easy Pancakes. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
title: Easy Pancakes

question: What is step 2 for making Homemade Chicken Stir Fry?
answer: Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat.
context: Recipe: Homemade Chicken Stir Fry. Full instructions: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.

context: Recipe: Perfect Spaghetti Carbonara. Instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
title: Perfect Spaghetti Carbonara

question: What is step 3 for making Perfect Beef Tacos?
answer: Warm taco shells according to package directions.
context: Recipe: Perfect Beef Tacos. Full instructions: In large skillet, cook ground beef over medium-high heat until browned drain. title: Perfect Beef Tacos

question: How do I cook Homemade Beef Tacos?
answer: In large skillet, cook ground beef over medium-high heat until browned drain. Add taco seasoning and water simmer 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Warm taco shells according to package directions. Fill each shell with beef mixture and desired toppings. Serve with salsa.

Warm taco shells according to package directions. Fill each shell with beef mixture and desired toppings. Serve with salsa.

question: How do you make Perfect Caesar Salad?
answer: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add romaine lettuce and toss to coat with dressing. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and croutons. Serve immediately.
context: Recipe: Perfect Caesar Salad. Ingredients: 1 large head romaine lettuce chopped, 12 cup mayonnaise, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce, 12 cup grated Parmesan cheese, 14 cup olive oil, salt and pepper to taste, 1 cup croutons. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add romaine lettuce and toss to coat with dressing. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and croutons. Serve immediately.
title: Perfect Caesar Salad

question: What is step 3 for making Classic Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies?
answer: Beat in eggs and vanilla.
context: Recipe: Classic Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies. Full instructions: Heat oven to 375F. In large bowl, beat butter and sugars with electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla. In medium bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and salt gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well mixed. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Cool 2 minutes remove from cookie sheets to cooling racks.
title: Classic Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies

question: What do you need to cook Perfect Chicken Stir Fry?
answer: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast cut into strips, 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, 1 red bell pepper sliced, 1 cup broccoli florets, 1 carrot julienned, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 tablespoon fresh ginger grated, 14 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 green onions sliced, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, cooked rice for serving
context: Recipe: Perfect Chicken Stir Fry. Ingredients: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast cut into strips, 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, 1 red bell pepper sliced, 1 cup broccoli florets, 1 carrot julienned, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 tablespoon fresh ginger grated, 14 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 green onions sliced, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, cooked rice for serving. Instructions: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
title: Perfect Chicken Stir Fry

Instructions: Heat oven to 375F. In large bowl, beat butter and sugars with electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla. In medium bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and salt gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well mixed. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Cool 2 minutes remove from cookie sheets to cooling racks.
title: Easy Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies

title: Classic Spaghetti Carbonara

question: List the ingredients for Classic Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies.
answer: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 cup butter softened, 34 cup granulated sugar, 34 cup packed brown sugar, 2 large eggs, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 cups chocolate chips
context: Recipe: Classic Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 cup butter softened, 34 cup granulated sugar, 34 cup packed brown sugar, 2 large eggs, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 cups chocolate chips. Instructions: Heat oven to 375F. In large bowl, beat butter and sugars with electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla. In medium bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and salt gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well mixed. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Cool 2 minutes remove from cookie sheets to cooling racks.
title: Classic Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies

question: How long does it take to make Easy Pancakes?
answer: 3 minutes
context: Recipe: Easy Pancakes. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
title: Easy Pancakes

question: List the components for classic spaghetti carbonara.
answer: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped
context: Recipe: Classic Spaghetti Carbonara. Ingredients: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped. Instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
title: Classic Spaghetti Carbonara

title: Homemade Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies

question: How do I cook Homemade Chicken Stir Fry?
answer: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
context: Recipe: Homemade Chicken Stir Fry. Ingredients: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast cut into strips, 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, 1 red bell pepper sliced, 1 cup broccoli florets, 1 carrot julienned, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 tablespoon fresh ginger grated, 14 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 green onions sliced, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, cooked rice for serving. Instructions: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
title: Homemade Chicken Stir Fry

question: What's required for making Classic Pancakes?
answer: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving
context: Recipe: Classic Pancakes. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
title: Classic Pancakes

context: Recipe: Perfect Beef Tacos. question: What are the steps for making Easy Caesar Salad?
answer: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add romaine lettuce and toss to coat with dressing. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and croutons. Serve immediately.
context: Recipe: Easy Caesar Salad. Ingredients: 1 large head romaine lettuce chopped, 12 cup mayonnaise, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard, 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce, 12 cup grated Parmesan cheese, 14 cup olive oil, salt and pepper to taste, 1 cup croutons. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper. Add romaine lettuce and toss to coat with dressing. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and croutons. Serve immediately.
title: Easy Caesar Salad

question: How do you make classic chocolate chip prepareies?
answer: Heat oven to 375F. In large bowl, beat butter and sugars with electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla. In medium bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and salt gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well mixed. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Cool 2 minutes remove from cookie sheets to cooling racks.
context: Recipe: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 cup butter softened, 34 cup granulated sugar, 34 cup packed brown sugar, 2 large eggs, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, 1 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 cups chocolate chips. Instructions: Heat oven to 375F. In large bowl, beat butter and sugars with electric mixer until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla. In medium bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and salt gradually add to butter mixture, beating until well mixed. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Cool 2 minutes remove from cookie sheets to cooling racks.
title: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies

question: What do you need to cook Pancakes?
answer: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving
context: Recipe: Pancakes. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
title: Pancakes

question: How do you make Easy Chicken Stir Fry?
answer: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
context: Recipe: Easy Chicken Stir Fry. Ingredients: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast cut into strips, 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, 1 red bell pepper sliced, 1 cup broccoli florets, 1 carrot julienned, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 tablespoon fresh ginger grated, 14 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 green onions sliced, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, cooked rice for serving. Instructions: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
title: Easy Chicken Stir Fry

question: How do you make Homemade Spaghetti Carbonara?
answer: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
context: Recipe: Homemade Spaghetti Carbonara. Ingredients: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped. Instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
title: Homemade Spaghetti Carbonara

question: What are the steps for making Classic Pancakes?
answer: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
context: Recipe: Classic Pancakes. Ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, 2 large eggs, 1 34 cups milk, 14 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, butter for cooking, maple syrup for serving. Instructions: In large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients stir just until combined (batter will be lumpy). Heat griddle or large skillet over medium heat brush with butter. Pour 14 cup batter for each pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 minutes. Flip and cook 1-2 minutes more until golden brown. Serve with maple syrup.
title: Classic Pancakes

question: What are the steps for making Easy Spaghetti Carbonara?
answer: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
context: Recipe: Easy Spaghetti Carbonara. Ingredients: 1 pound spaghetti pasta, 6 large eggs, 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese, 8 ounces pancetta or bacon diced, 4 cloves garlic minced, 12 cup dry white wine, salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste, 2 tablespoons fresh parsley chopped. Instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions until al dente drain, reserving 1 cup pasta water. In large skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until crispy. Add garlic cook 1 minute. Add wine simmer until reduced by half. In large bowl, whisk together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Add hot pasta to pancetta mixture toss to combine. Remove from heat and quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed to create creamy sauce. Season with salt and pepper garnish with parsley.
title: Easy Spaghetti Carbonara

question: What's the recipe for Easy Chicken Stir Fry?
answer: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
context: Recipe: Easy Chicken Stir Fry. Ingredients: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast cut into strips, 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, 1 red bell pepper sliced, 1 cup broccoli florets, 1 carrot julienned, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 tablespoon fresh ginger grated, 14 cup soy sauce, 2 tablespoons oyster sauce, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 green onions sliced, 1 tablespoon sesame oil, cooked rice for serving. Instructions: In small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and cornstarch set aside. Heat vegetable oil in large wok or skillet over high heat. Add chicken stir-fry 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Remove chicken from pan. Add bell pepper, broccoli, and carrot to pan stir-fry 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger stir-fry 30 seconds. Return chicken to pan. Add sauce mixture stir-fry 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens. Remove from heat stir in green onions and sesame oil. Serve over rice.
title: Easy Chicken Stir Fry
